# External Reference: badlogic/pi-skills

## What it is

A repository of agent skills packaged as separate folders with `SKILL.md`-style instructions and setup notes.

## Why it is useful to WayWarden

The strongest contribution is the **directory model and skill catalog shape**:

- one folder per skill
- self-contained instructions and setup
- discoverable expansion path for new capabilities

## What to pull now

- Folder structure for skills
- Skill metadata / instruction pattern
- Initial shortlist of high-value skills:
  - web search
  - browser automation
  - calendar
  - drive
  - gmail
  - transcription
  - youtube transcript

## What not to pull blindly

- upstream implementation details that assume Pi-specific runtime behavior
- anything that adds complexity before WayWarden has a clear capability boundary model
